title: angelica anomala
intro: Angelica anomala, also known as Dong Quai or Chinese Angelica, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the carrot family (Apiaceae). It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Angelica anomala include its ability to regulate menstrual cycles, reduce menopausal symptoms, and alleviate digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy for women's health. Angelica anomala can be prepared as an herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
